# 2.5. Are there concerns about the plausibility of conducting the study using the reported methods and resources? <span class="badge badge-draft1">✎ Very rough draft</span>

```{r}
#| include: false
if(file.exists("../_setup.R")){source("../_setup.R")}
```

Consider whether the protocol could realistically be implemented given the study setting, staffing, and funding.
